Benchmarks infino's embedded BM25 FTS index — one infino superfile is a valid Apache Parquet file with this index baked in.
Index blob is read into memory and searched in-process.
Term dictionary is an FST; postings are PFOR-delta encoded with a skip table.
BM25 with Lucene defaults (k1=1.2, b=0.75) and Lucene-style IDF.
Per-doc length normalization is precomputed at build time and stored alongside the postings.
Single-term and intersection (AND) top-k use BlockMaxWAND over the skip table.
Disjunction (OR) top-k chooses between WAND/BlockMaxWAND and MaxScore/Block-Max-MaxScore.
Posting scoring is SIMD-accelerated (4 terms at a time).
Phrase queries and fast-field ordering are unsupported (no positional postings, score-ordered results only).
